## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or enhancement you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional context

Mockups, links to related issues, upstream Mastodon references, or anything
else that helps frame the request.
